text:
# `mxlpy.symbolic.strikepy`

Reimplementation of strikepy from.

StrikePy: https://github.com/afvillaverde/StrikePy
STRIKE-GOLDD: https://github.com/afvillaverde/strike-goldd

FIXME:
- no handling of derived variables
- performance issues of generic_rank

## Classes

### class `Options`

Algorithm options.

### class `Result`

Result.

**Methods**

- `all_inputs_observable(self) -> bool` — True if all inputs are observable.
- `summary(self) -> str` — Summary of result.

### class `StrikepyModel`

StrikePy model.

## Functions

### `check_identifiability(model: SymbolicModel, outputs: list[sympy.Symbol]) -> Result`

Check identifiability of model.

Parameters
----------
model
    Symbolic model to analyse
outputs
    List of symbols representing measured outputs

Returns
-------
Result
    Identifiability and observability results

### `strike_goldd(model: StrikepyModel, options: Options | None = None) -> Result`

Run Strike-Goldd algorithm.

Parameters
----------
model
    Strikepy model containing states, parameters, equations and outputs
options
    Algorithm options, or None to use defaults

Returns
-------
Result
    Identifiability and observability results
